notes: PROC RANK deciles predicted_risk into 10 groups, PROC TABULATE summarizes cost/LOS fields by decile, PROC SGPLOT charts mean BMI and mean maternal cost by decile. Original reads csai.npdc_val_risk_cost from a private LIBNAME (de-identified AIHW linkage data); substituted a 15-row mock cohort with the same predicted_risk/bmi/mother_age/cost columns via inline datalines. Logic, PROC options and output semantics unchanged.
